pending.body: finding_summary: equivalent planned-elsewhere targets are merged as conflicts when reviewers use different allowed aliases for the same nearby bead. `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs:556-567` adds both canonical and short-form nearby IDs to the allowlist, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:439-441` exposes every allowed form to reviewers, but `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:541-584` compares `mapped_to_bead_id` as raw strings during amendment merge. If one reviewer writes `9ni.6.5` and another writes `6.5`, the merge downgrades the amendment to `fix-now` even though both point at the same bead. affected_files: `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs`. remediation_hint: canonicalize `mapped_to_bead_id` against the prompt allowlist before merging/voting, or stop advertising short aliases in reviewer guidance.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 11 -> Plan and Implement
